{{Quote|Acknowledged, ''Chimaera''. Good hunting.|Captain Aban reports in to Grand Admiral Thrawn prior to the [[Battle at Ukio|assault]] on [[Ukio]]|<ref name="TLC">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Aban''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] military officer in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]] who served as [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and commanding officer of the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Bellicose (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Bellicose'']] during [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn's]] campaign against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Aban was assigned to oversee the construction of the [[Imperial Aquatic Garrison]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Sedri/Legends|Sedri]] after the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] discovered the world. [[Starship/Legends|Ships]] travelling to Sedri were still lost due to having to disable their [[hyperdrive inhibitor]]s, making Imperial command reluctant to send more ships. This left the base understaffed, undersupplied, and isolated from the rest of the Empire. Aban was also ordered to obtain the [[Golden Sun]] as soon as possible. To achieve his mission, Aban had a [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]] dispatch patrols to search Sedrian villages looking for the Golden Sun. If the patrols had not found the Golden Sun by the time an [[Aquatic Terrain Armored Transport]] was ready for deployment, Aban planned to raze the villages one by one until the Sedrians gave up its location.<ref name="BGS" />

Aban entered into an arrangement with [[Karak]], leader of a band of Sedrian [[Karak's renegades|renegades]]. In exchange for military support and weapons, Karak would give Aban half of the Golden Sun as well as the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] [[Mors Odrion]]. The Imperial-led [[Battle of Fitsay|attack]] on the settlement of [[Fitsay]] ultimately failed; when Aban contact Imperial command to request reinforcements to continue his campaign, Aban was told to make do with the forces he had available to him.<ref name="BGS" />

After the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] he was reassigned to the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Starfleet]], as commanding officer of the [[Bellicose (Imperial-class)/Legends|''Bellicose'']]. Aban was a part of Thrawn's personal armada and as such was placed in command of Thrawn's [[Taanab operation|operations]] in the [[Taanab system/Legends|Taanab system]] following the failure at the [[Battle of Sluis Van]]. During this operation, the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] [[Joruus C'baoth]] disobeyed Aban's orders and did as he pleased with the gunnery controls.

Aban later commanded the ''Bellicose'' in an assault operation against the New Republic base on [[Ord Pardron/Legends|Ord Pardron]] in an effort to allow the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire's]] [[Battle at Ukio|capture]] of the [[Ukio system/Legends|Ukio system]]. Like most of the commanders under Thrawn, Aban was last reported in combat operations commanding the ''Bellicose'' at the [[Battle of Bilbringi (9 ABY)|Battle of Bilbringi]].<ref name="TLC" />

==Personality and traits==
Aban was eager to take the fight to the New Republic as he and the rest of Grand Admiral Thrawn's forces prepared their assault on the Ukio system, but he was able to mostly conceal these emotions with his military demeanor.<ref name="TLC" />
